title: OCI Privilege Escalation Chain Detection
description: Detects potential privilege escalation by identifying users who perform a sequence of IAM operations: creating policies, groups, or dynamic groups followed by adding themselves to privileged groups. Combines multiple identity control plane events from the same principal to surface escalation chains.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and 'Event Type' like 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.*' | stats count as iam_ops, distinctcount('Event Type') as unique_actions by 'User Name' | sort -iam_ops | where iam_ops > 5 and unique_actions > 3
